# Drill

## Tags
power, bit, head, hole, diy, toolbox, build, construction

## Categories
tools, home, devices

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/drill)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Drill;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Drill { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
